RemediationStrings.Title: NoDriveTypeAutoRun (Administrative Templates - File Explorer)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer\NoDriveTypeAutoRun must be 255. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - File Explorer.

RemediationStrings.Title: NoWebServices (Administrative Templates - File Explorer)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer\NoWebServices must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - File Explorer.

RemediationStrings.Title: NoAutorun (Administrative Templates - File Explorer)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer\NoAutorun must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - File Explorer.

RemediationStrings.Title: NoAutoplayfornonVolume (Administrative Templates - File Explorer)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Explorer\NoAutoplayfornonVolume must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - File Explorer.

RemediationStrings.Title: DisableMotWOnInsecurePathCopy (Administrative Templates - File Explorer)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Explorer\DisableMotWOnInsecurePathCopy must be 0. Severity: Medium. Category: Administrative Templates - File Explorer.
